name: KunlunWonderland
short_description: 《Kunlun Wonderland 》is a game with many art themes and playing methods, At present, simple and casual first person shooting is the main method. Support the way of playing make a wish and tell me what you want.
detailed_description:
Introduction to the game:

"Kun lun Wonderland" is a multi art and multi play game.

If you can choose a game to go through, life will last forever. You can choose it. I try to connect fantasy and reality with it,

Get some experience that you can't get in reality.

Support your wish and tell me what you want.

Currently you will play to:

Simple weightless first person multiplayer shooting experience. Players meet in near orbit, breaking the conventional shackles and making weightlessness a weapon. There is also the traditional first person multiplayer shooting experience (unfinished, but playable.)

Unfinished but already in progress:

For example, simple first person battlefield shooting experience, simple zombie shooting, dungeon walking, art scene walking, etc., please look forward to it.

What will be done in the future:

Super giant sandbox, fully programmed scenes and NPCs, early available BCI technology test projects, and players' own in-depth learning data for fully automatic generation and operation of the game.

The initial version of development does not represent the final quality.

Development cost:

At present, the total development cost of the game (excluding the time cost) is only the steam developer deposit (US $100?), which temporarily includes free game materials+self modeling, etc.

Q&A

Why should I release the game and release steam before the game is finished?

This is not a complete game, but playability and submission are more important than completion. Games with more developers cannot reach the submission and completion stage. Submit it to give me a motivation and self realization?

Why play games?

I want to leave something in this world.
